untranslatable_reason: This signal requires geometric angle line construction (1x1 at 45°, 2x1, 4x1, 8x1 resistance angles, 1x2, 1x4, 1x8 support angles) drawn from highest/lowest prices, and detection of crossover points between these lines. The backtest engine does not have indicators to construct dynamic geometric angle lines, detect price following specific angles, or identify line intersection zones. These are custom geometric constructions not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal is a geometric/visual pattern-based strategy requiring manual angle line drawing and visual pattern recognition. No direct equivalent exists in standard technical indicators. Approximated with SMA crossovers as a trend-following proxy, but this does NOT capture the core geometric angle mechanism described in the original signal.
